name: Amit Bhatia
profileSummary: Amit Bhatia is a British-Indian businessman, entrepreneur, and investor. He is a founder and managing director of AyBe Capital Advisers and is an owner and director of Queens Park Rangers. Bhatia is also the chairman of Breedon Group, an independent construction material supplier in the UK, and a founding partner of Summix Capital, a real estate private equity firm.
